skills.name: find-security-services
skills.description: Find which security and fire-safety systems J&L Security installs and maintains across Essex and Greater London, with features, benefits and page links.

skills.name: check-service-area
skills.description: Check whether J&L Security covers a given UK town or postcode for security and fire-alarm work across Essex and Greater London.

skills.name: get-quote-and-contact
skills.description: Get J&L Security contact channels and explain how a customer books a free security or fire-safety survey and quote.

skills.name: get-pricing-guide
skills.description: Retrieve J&L Security indicative installed costs for burglar alarms, CCTV and fire-alarm systems in the UK for 2026.
